Our Story

Crafting Spaces That Inspire Daily

At Livara Homes, we believe every space deserves interiors that feel personal, polished, and purposeful. Based in Wakad, Pune, we've been transforming homes and offices for over 8 years with our signature blend of design intelligence and craftsmanship.

From precision-engineered modular kitchens and bespoke wardrobes to vibrant painting solutions and premium flooring — every project we undertake carries our commitment to quality, timelines, and trust.

✦

Premium Quality

Only the finest materials sourced for lasting elegance.

◈

Expert Design

Functional aesthetics tailored to your lifestyle.

◎

On-Time Delivery

We respect your time as much as your space.

❖

After-Sales Care

We stand behind every project we complete.

Exterior House Painting

Premium wall paints with flawless finish. Vibrant palettes, expert application, and clean execution every time.

Painting

Interior & Waterproofing

Weather-resistant exterior finishes and professional waterproofing to protect your home through every season.

Painting

Texture & Special Finishes

Elevate your walls with designer textures, wood stains, and metallic finishes that add depth and character.

Flooring

Vinyl Flooring

Durable, water-resistant vinyl flooring in wood, stone, and abstract patterns. Ideal for high-traffic areas and wet spaces.

Wooden Flooring

Warm, rich, and timeless — solid hardwood and engineered wood flooring that adds natural elegance to any room.

Why Choose Us

The Livara Difference

01

End-to-End Design & Execution

From initial concept and 3D visualization to final installation — we handle everything under one roof, ensuring a seamless and stress-free experience.

02

Premium Materials, Honest Pricing

We use only grade-A materials from trusted brands and maintain complete transparency in our pricing — no hidden costs, ever.

03

Skilled & Trained Craftsmen

Our team of carpenters, painters, and flooring specialists are trained professionals with years of experience in high-end residential and commercial projects.

04

Warranty & Post-Completion Support

Every project comes with comprehensive warranty coverage and dedicated after-sales support for your peace of mind.

"Designing spaces that feel like home the moment you walk in."

How We Work

Our Simple Process

01

Free Consultation

Tell us your vision. Our designers visit your space for a no-obligation consultation and assessment.

02

Design & Proposal

We create a detailed design plan with 3D renders and a transparent cost estimate tailored to your budget.

03

Expert Execution

Our skilled team executes every detail with precision, keeping you updated at every milestone.

04

Handover & Care

We do a thorough quality check before handover, then remain available for any after-care support you need.

Ready to Transform Your Space?

Book a free home visit and get your personalised design proposal within 48 hours.
